summary: Comprehensive testing of Engineer Visit Workflow (Phases 1-3). All backend API tests passed (15/15). Frontend UI tests successful for all visit workflow components - Start Visit, Add Report dialog, Request Parts dialog, Checkout dialog, and Calendar floating popup.
passed_tests: Phase 1: Calendar floating popup opens when clicking calendar events (not inline panel)
Phase 2a: Ticket detail page shows 'Start Visit' button for accepted tickets
Phase 2b: Clicking Start Visit creates visit record, shows timer with action buttons (Add Report, Request Parts, Check Out)
Phase 2c: Add Report dialog opens with fields: Problem Found*, Diagnosis, Solution Applied, Resolution Type (Fixed/Parts Needed/Escalate), Notes
Phase 2c: Resolution type buttons are clickable and highlight when selected
Phase 2c: Save Report button submits and updates visit record
Phase 2d: Checkout dialog shows duration timer, visit summary, resolution type selection, customer name field
Phase 2d: Checkout moves ticket to appropriate stage (Fixed→Work Done, Parts Needed→Awaiting Parts, Escalation→Escalated)
Phase 3a: Request Parts dialog allows adding multiple part items (name, qty, price)
Phase 3a: Parts table shows calculated GST and totals
Phase 3b: Parts request auto-creates quotation draft (verified via toast notification showing quotation number)
Phase 3c: Backend validation - Start visit returns 404 for invalid ticket
Phase 3c: Backend validation - Update returns 404 for invalid/completed visit
Phase 3c: Backend validation - Checkout returns 404 for invalid visit
Phase 3c: Backend validation - Empty parts list rejected (400)
Phase 3d: Admin can list parts requests via GET /api/admin/parts-requests
Phase 3d: Admin can filter parts requests by status

calendar_floating_popup.details: EventDetailPanel renders as floating modal centered on screen with dark overlay

auto_create_quotation.details: Parts request creates draft quotation automatically with auto-generated number (e.g., QT-572711)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Engineer visit workflow fully tested. Test data: testeng@test.com engineer with TEST-9999 ticket. Multiple visits completed during testing. Parts requests created with auto-quotations (QT-572711 etc). All endpoints are real - no mocked APIs. Calendar floating popup works for events with linked tickets.
